strategies.name: SMA Crossover
strategies.description: Golden cross on hourly NQ: long when 50-bar SMA crosses above 200-bar SMA; flat when it crosses below. Long-only to align with NQ's structural uptrend.

strategies.name: RSI Mean Reversion
strategies.description: Long when RSI dips below 35; short when RSI spikes above 65. Exits when RSI reverts to the opposite threshold. Wider thresholds than classic 30/70 to generate meaningful trade frequency on 1h NQ.

strategies.name: IFVG + CISD
strategies.description: Hourly adaptation of the FYP strategy: requires both a bullish Inverse Fair Value Gap and a Change in State of Delivery (breakout above prior 20-bar high) to confirm. Long-only to align with NQ's structural uptrend.

strategies.name: MACD Crossover
strategies.description: Long when MACD line crosses above the signal line; flat when it crosses below. Uses 48/104/18 EMAs on 1h bars: fast ~2 days, slow ~2 weeks. Long-only to align with NQ's structural upward bias.

strategies.name: Bollinger Mean Reversion
strategies.description: Buys NQ dips below the lower Bollinger Band and exits at the middle band. Long-only to capitalise on NQ's tendency to recover from oversold dips. Uses 1.5σ bands on 1h for sufficient trade frequency.

strategies.name: MACD + Bollinger Combo
strategies.description: Dual-confirmation dip-buyer: enters long when price is below the lower Bollinger Band AND MACD is bullish. Long-only — both signals must confirm before buying NQ dips. Exits when price reverts to the middle band or MACD flips.

strategies.name: Opening Range Breakout
strategies.description: Trades volume-confirmed breakouts above/below the first 1h bar each session. Volume must exceed 1.5x OR-bar average to confirm institutional participation. One trade per day; held to close. Captures intraday momentum on NQ futures.

strategies.name: VWAP Mean Reversion
strategies.description: Fades price deviations >0.6% from the session VWAP. VWAP resets daily; exits when price reverts or after 4 bars max. Exploits institutional rebalancing flow on NQ 1h.

strategies.name: Overnight Gap Fade
strategies.description: Fades small overnight gaps (0.1-0.3%) on NQ open. Enters on the 09:30 bar; exits on gap fill or after 2 bars. Exploits mean-reversion of retail over-reaction at the open.
